/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/DOG_SIM.dir/src/dog_hardware.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DOG_SIM.dir/src/dog_sim.cpp.o -o DOG_SIM   -L/usr/local/include/eigen3  -L/usr/local/include/osqp  -L/usr/local/include/OsqpEigen  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/include/eigen3:/usr/local/include/osqp:/usr/local/include/OsqpEigen -lallLib
